parameters.name: apikey
parameters.value: =<cole aqui a service_role (Settings → API no Supabase)>

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "company_id": {{ JSON.stringify($('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.company_ID || $('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.company_id) }},
  "phone": {{ JSON.stringify($('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.remoteJid) }},
  "mensagem_id": {{ JSON.stringify($('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.messageId) }},
  "mensage_type": {{ JSON.stringify($('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.messageType) }},
  "text": {{ JSON.stringify($('When Executed by Another Workflow').first().json.conversation) }},
  "type": "lead",
  "plataforma": "WhatsApp"
}

nodes.name: Adicionar mensagem usuario texto
nodes.notes: Substitui o nó Supabase Create em mensagens. Idempotente por (company_id, mensagem_id) via RPC upsert_mensagem.
